inputs.label: Pressure (kgf/cm²)
inputs.businessContext: The pressure value to convert, in kilogram-force per square centimeter.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: The conversion factor from kgf/cm² to psi (1 kgf/cm² = 14.2233 psi). This is a fixed physical constant; do not modify.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output psi value.

inputs.label: Output Scale
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for the converted result (e.g., use 1 for actual value, 1000 for display in kilopounds).
